msg: M12's check #9 covered only 2 of 3 a1-check invariants — frontmatter_link was silently missing from the merge; caught while planning the switchover, fixed as check #10 before flipping Gate 4.5

Backticks inserted into help.cjs usage text sat inside a template literal and broke module load — ALL 22 suites went red at once; full-suite gate caught it, node --check alone had passed the other files
install-sync fixture regex pinned the literal '17 skills' count and silently stopped corrupting the scope note after the count changed; made count-agnostic (\d+)
Decision doc's XML-tag census and my first regex both missed digit-named tags (phase_1_discover) and alex's principles tag — residual grep after conversion caught 2 extra files
